title: marrubium supinum var. boissieri
intro: Marrubium supinum var. boissieri is a variant of the marrubium plant species, also known as grey horehound, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Marrubium supinum var. boissieri include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from sore throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
